title: PokeTale Cobblemon
description: PokeTale is a magical themed Cobblemon pack focused on progression, competition, and long term gameplay!
body:
PokeTale Cobblemon is the official modpack built for the PokeTale server, designed to deliver a complete magical Pokémon experience from the moment you load in.
Every mod, system, and mechanic in this pack exists to support a better quality of life experience!

This modpack is not intended for singleplayer, it is the foundation of a living, evolving Cobblemon server.

🌟 What This Server Modpack Offers

**Research-Based Pokédex Progression**
Pokédex completion is driven by structured research tasks instead of simple capture counts, rewarding exploration, battling, and long term play.

**Competitive & Casual Battle Systems**
Ranked battles, a custom Random Battles ladder and tournament support are fully integrated into the pack’s design.

**Raids & Legendary Content**
Team based raid encounters, legendary bosses, and relic driven summoning systems form the backbone of high level progression.

**NPC Gyms & Badge Progression**
A structured Gym challenge system with rotating NPC Gyms, badge tracking, and future Player Gyms and Elite Four support.

**Full Pokémon Battle Mechanics**
All major mechanics are enabled and supported:

Mega Evolution
Z-Moves
Dynamax
Terastallization


Discord: https://discord.gg/mHN4GHCchW
